Whereas Gazette Notification No. S.O. 2353(E) dated l2th Octob€r, 201 t was amended vide Notification dated 20th Sepremb€( 2013 to the extent of restoration ofcenificate of registration for Chlorpyriphos 50 % +Cypermethrin 5% EC Formulation of M/s. Gharda Chemicals Limited, as the formulation was held to be sal-e, provided it is applied in dtr- -- presribed dosage and manner. Whereas, taking notice ofNotification dated 20th September,2013 Pesticides Associations and Pesticides Companies have represented against the cancellation of certificates of registration granted under Section 9(4) for Chlorpyiphos 50 % + Cypermethrin 5%o EC Formulation. And whereas, after consideration ofall repres€ntati,ons, Notification No. S.O. 2353(E) dated l2th October,20l I published in the Cazene oflndia Extraordinary Pan -II Section-3 Sub-Section-ii is partially amended to the extent that all certificates ofregistration granted under Section 9(4) ofthe lnsecticides Act, I 96E for Chlorpyriphos 50%+ Cypermethrin 59ir EC Fonnulation are restored from the date ofnotifiiation in the Cazette oflndia for application in agriculture as per dosage and method approved by the Registration Committee.
